messages.content: Universal Healthcare seems like it would control too much. I'd rather have choices provided by private insurance.

Universal Healthcare ensures everyone has access, no matter their income. Imagine not worrying about medical bills. We could invest in better care for all, not just what our insurance will cover.

Personally, I've seen friends struggle with private insurance—denials and high costs aren't worth the "choice." Universal coverage might limit some things, but it's worth it for the peace of mind and care for all.
